summary: Tested 4 new features: FAQ role separation, AnnouncementBell, Broadcast InkBook News, Support Ticket System. Backend: 16/16 tests pass. Frontend: all critical flows verified via Playwright and screenshots.

minor.issue: API expects fields 'title' + 'message' (not 'content'/'subject'). Documented for frontend consumers - AdminPage.js already uses correct fields.

integration_issues.issue: Dropdown options confirmed in code (Für alle sichtbar / Nur für Kunden / Nur für Studios) but unable to screenshot modal due to session expiry in multi-step admin tests. Code review confirms correct implementation.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge at bottom-right intercepts clicks to support chat button (fixed via JS in tests, but affects real users who may struggle to open support chat if badge overlaps)

action_items: Minor: 'Made with Emergent' badge z-index overlaps support chat toggle button at bottom-right (support-chat-toggle). Consider moving support chat button slightly above or offsetting position.
critical_code_review_comments: SupportChat.js Direct Chat (Pro-only): When non-pro customer accesses /api/support/direct, backend returns 403. Frontend shows 'Pro-Abo erforderlich' correctly.
Broadcast API field mismatch in documentation: BroadcastRequest model uses 'title'+'message' (not 'content'+'subject') - AdminPage already uses correct fields.
AnnouncementBell correctly shows red dot when active announcement exists and dismisses via localStorage.

success_rate.frontend: 95% - all critical flows passing, minor: admin detail panel click test limited by session

seed_data_creation: Created test support tickets (IB-5168, IB-6840, IB-2978) and test announcement during testing. TEST_ prefixed data created for backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features tested at iteration 20. Key results: 1) FAQ /api/faq/public?role=X filters correctly. 2) AnnouncementBell renders on dashboards with red dot and panel. 3) Broadcast via admin creates InkBook News conversation (read-only, no reply input). 4) Support ticket creation works (IB-XXXX format), 3 options in SupportChat widget, Pro-only direct chat returns 403 for non-pro users. Admin support-tickets section shows 3 sub-tabs (Tickets/Direkt-Chats/KI-Chats) with ticket list.
